title: The Boo Crew - Halloween Doll Witches Costume, Idea for Soft Plush Figure for Room Decor, Spooky Tabletop Decoration, Seasonal Collectable, Tradition for Kids & Adults
features: The Boo Crew: From the creators of Elves Behavin' Badly comes an exciting new Halloween tradition, this delightfully spooky doll with its wardrobe of accessories is designed to bring thrills, giggles, and ghostly fun to families year after year. With its playful charm and mischievous personality, it’s the perfect way to spark children’s imaginations and build anticipation for the big night.

Dress up: Spark new ideas with our wide range of costumes—perfect for inspiring fun and imagination, whether for the little ones or yourself. In the nights before Halloween, make every moment an adventure, our costumes are your ticket to fun, fright, and fantastic memories. Every night before Halloween is a chance to dream up something new—let our costumes ignite the magic for both the young and the young at heart.

Features: Get ready for a spooktacular countdown to Halloween with our Boo Crew doll! Designed with flexible arms and legs, a rotating head, and hands that fasten together using a clever hook-and-loop system, this doll can be arranged in countless fun and frightful poses. Whether hanging from a shelf, striking a spooky stance, or holding a mini Halloween accessory, it's perfect for creating new surprises each day leading up to October 31st.

Dimensions: Our Fun Witches Halloween inspired costume is designed to fit our Boo Crew Dolls. Perfectly sized for imaginative display play. Whether perched on a shelf or brought along on eerie adventures, With the aid of our costumes, the Boo Crew is sure to capture attention with their unique looks.

Fun and Mischief: The Boo Crew also encourages inclusive fun between adults and children with the daily surprises left by the Boo Crew and their overnight escapades adding to the excitement in the build up to Halloween night.
description: Product Description The Boo Crew - The New Face of Halloween The Boo Crew: From the creators of Elves Behavin' Badly comes an exciting new Halloween tradition, This delightfully spooky doll is designed to bring thrills, giggles, and ghostly fun to families year after year. Welcome to SPOOKSVILLE A spellbinding town where magic and mystery enchant the air and which is shrouded in perpetual twilight and ghostly spirits. The streets are often lined with gnarled trees that cast long twisted shadows and the windows of the house flicker with mysterious lights. All who enter sense a shift in the air and a chill that lingers, no matter the season. Despite its spookiness, Spooksville does have an eerie charm and intriguing inhabitants. Nestled in a hollow, is the HAUNTED HOUSE . Little is known about the origins of the Haunted House other than that it is inhabited by Sir Spookalot , the master of the House and guardian of Halloween. The once imposing house and grounds have now fallen into ruin, its grand rooms now dotted with dust and cobwebs and vines creep up the side reclaiming the stone and wood. Ghostly figures are often seen wandering the halls. The grounds are filled with tombstones and the GRAVEYARD GUARDIANS take pride in their role as protectors of the spooky cemetery. Meet the Crew Previous page Next page The newly formed Boo Crew , Percy, Polly, Skelly & Skellabella, pass through the magic portal that connects Spooksville to the human world and accept their mission from Sir Spookalot, " to Save Halloween". Previous page A Yearly Tradition The New Face of Halloween Introducing Our Boo Crew Dolls! Mr and Mrs Pumpkin-Head and Mr and Mrs Skelly-Bones Halloween Ideas 7 Different Spooky Outfits Be creative with our Fun Vampire, Clown, Witch, Scarecrow, Mummy Werewolf and Undertaker Outfits. Set the Scene 4 Designs Available Stage your dolls using the Warning sign as props! Get Ready for Halloween Bunting and Gel Window Stickers The Boo Crew can often leave evidence of their arrival Halloween Water Bottles Great Gift Ideas for Halloween Spooky Mr & Mrs Skelly-Bones and Mr & Mrs Pumpkin-Head Bottles Next page 1 Boo Crew Dolls 2 Boo Crew Outfits 3 Boo Crew Accessories 4 Boo Crew Decorations 5 Boo Crew Bottles The Boo Crew Outfits Scarecrow Costume Add To Basket Mummy Costume Add To Basket Clown Costume Add To Basket Werewolf Costume Add To Basket Vampire Costume Buying Options Witche's Costume Add To Basket Undertaker Costume Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 17 4.6 out of 5 stars 17 4.6 out of 5 stars 17 4.6 out of 5 stars 17 4.6 out of 5 stars 17 4.6 out of 5 stars 17 4.6 out of 5 stars 17 Price £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 — £7.99 £ 7 . 99 — Colour Black and Red White & Red Multicoloured Grey Black and Red Black and Purple Black and Red The Outfit Daily Schedule Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday Sunday Spook Factor? Yes Yes Yes Yes Yes Yes Yes Doll Sized Costume? ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Piece Count 3 3 3 1 1 2 3 How tall are The Boo Crew Dolls Each doll stands approximately 30cm tall – the perfect size for play, and dressing up with our accessories Can it be posed? This soft cloth doll has flexible limbs that can be gently moved for cuddly play. The hands feature Hook and Loopp so they can stick together While not rigidly jointed like an action figure, it’s designed for imaginative posing. Is it machine washable? Easy to care for – simply hand wash to keep your dolls and Outfits fresh and huggable for years of play. (Not suitable for machine washing.) Can the dolls be used outdoors? Designed for indoor play and display. While it won’t be harmed by occasional outings, this soft toy is best kept indoors to stay clean, cuddly, and looking its best. Are the dolls safe for children? Yes! Made from soft, child-friendly materials with no hard edges, this doll is designed for safe play and cuddles. Suitable for ages 3 and over.
